basic_details.job_title: DLSA Balod Paralegal Volunteer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority, Balod (DLSA Balod)
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority, Balod (DLSA Balod) Paralegal Volunteer Notification 2026 has been released on 23 May 2026 on the official website of DLSA Balod. The recruitment notification has been issued for Paralegal Volunteer posts under contractual basis.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th Class passed, Local resident of Balod district, Knowledge of computer and mobile
qualification.details: 12th Class passed. Must be a local resident of Balod district. Knowledge of computer and mobile is necessary. Interest in social work for providing free legal aid to needy persons.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Balod Paralegal Volunteer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Balod Paralegal Volunteer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DLSA Balod Paralegal Volunteer posts is 05 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Paralegal Volunteer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 12th Class and be a local resident of Balod district. Knowledge of computer and mobile is also necessary.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the DLSA Balod Paralegal Volunteer position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by sending the completed application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the DLSA Balod Paralegal Volunteer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Paralegal Volunteer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Paralegal Volunteer post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the Paralegal Volunteer position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Paralegal Volunteer position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q7. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the District Legal Services Authority, Balod district in Chhattisgarh.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 348/DLSA/2026.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age limit relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age limits and any applicable relaxations.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of knowledge is required besides the 12th pass qualification?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have knowledge of computers and mobile, and an interest in social work for providing free legal aid.
